title: meliosma isthmensis
intro: Meliosma isthmensis, also known as the Panama flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Central America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Meliosma isthmensis is often used in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, which are available in some health food stores and online retailers.
